Pricing

Choose your Fragments journey

Whether you are here to learn or to teach, pick a plan that matches how you use fragment trails.

Learners

For learners

Read, join trails, and discuss—pick ad-supported Basic or focused Pro.

Basic Learner

$5/month

For curious minds starting their learning journey.

  • Access to all fragments
  • Join fragment trails
  • Basic discussion participation
  • Contains advertisements
Get started

Most popular

Pro Learner

$15/month

Ad-free learning with a few extras for serious students.

  • Everything in Basic Learner
  • Ad-free experience
  • Weekly curated newsletter
  • Priority support
Get started

Educators

For educators

Create fragments and trails, see analytics, and scale with your cohorts.

Basic Educator

$20/month

Share knowledge and run trails with core tools.

  • Create fragments
  • Create fragment trails
  • Advanced analytics
  • Contains advertisements
Get started

Premium

Pro Educator

$30/month

Premium tools and visibility for professional educators.

  • Everything in Basic Educator
  • Ad-free experience
  • Weekly curated newsletter
  • Verified educator badge
  • Priority support
Get started

Support

Frequently asked questions

Fragments

The discussion platform for U.S. schools and serious learners: guided trails, transparent moderation, and credit for educators who show up with rigor.
